args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts

- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
- Reads as: TypeScript interface definitions and class implementation
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types
- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating Hono app instances and handler arrays with up to 10 handlers, supporting environment merging through generic type parameters

## src/helper/route/index.ts

- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: Context utility functions with WeakMap caching
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request/constants, src/types, src/utils/url
- Safe summary: Route inspection utilities for retrieving matched routes and path information from context, including base path extraction and dynamic parameter resolution

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts

- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSContext, WSReadyState, WSContextInit, SendOptions, WSMessageReceive, createWSMessageEvent, defineWebSocketHelper
- Reads as: TypeScript interfaces, classes, and function implementations
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types
- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade and management helper with event listener support (onOpen, onMessage, onClose, onError) and WSContext wrapper class

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts

- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
- Reads as: Cookie utility functions
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/cookie
- Safe summary: Cookie management with signed cookie support via parseSigned/serializeSigned and __Secure- and __Host- prefix handling for security compliance

## src/helper/testing/index.ts

- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: Client generation function returning UnionToIntersection type
- Neighbor files: src/client, src/client/types, src/context, src/hono, src/types
- Safe summary: Testing helper for creating test clients with custom fetch implementations that calls app.request instead of native fetch

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts

- Main exports or names: env, Runtime, knownUserAgents, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals
- Reads as: Runtime detection utility with conditional type return
- Neighbor files: src/context
- Safe summary: Runtime detection for node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light using user agent and global properties with environment binding support

## src/helper/css/index.ts

- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
- Reads as: CSS-in-JS helper with default context instance
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx/constants, src/jsx/dom/css, src/utils/html, ./common
- Safe summary: Experimental CSS-in-JS helper providing styled() template tags, class name concatenation, keyframes, view transitions with WeakMap context tracking

## src/helper/css/common.ts

- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, SELECTORS, EXTERNAL_CLASS_NAMES, rawCssString, minify, buildStyleString, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
- Reads as: CSS utility functions and constants with unique symbols
- Neighbor files: ./index
- Safe summary: Shared CSS utility functions for building style strings, class names, keyframes, and view transitions with minification and hash generation

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts

- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: Proxy fetch function with RFC 9110 compliance
- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: HTTP proxy helper with hop-by-hop header removal, strict Connection header validation, and optional custom fetch support for credentials

## src/helper/dev/index.ts

- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: Development utility functions with console output
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
- Safe summary: Development helper for inspecting and displaying registered routes with optional colorization and verbose mode showing handler names

## src/helper/html/index.ts

- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: HTML string builder function with escaping
- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
- Safe summary: HTML escaping and rendering helper supporting template literals with automatic escaping via escapeToBuffer and callback resolution

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts

- Main exports or names: ssg, toSSG, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
- Reads as: SSG generation utility with middleware exports
- Neighbor files: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
- Safe summary: Static site generation helper with plugins and middleware for static content export including dynamic parameter generation

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts

- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, FileSystemModule, ToSSGResult, ToSSGOptions, SSGPlugin
- Reads as: SSG core implementation with generator functions
- Neighbor files: ./index, ./middleware, ./utils, ./plugins, src/client/utils, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime
- Safe summary: SSG core implementation with file system operations, concurrent route fetching, extension mapping, and plugin hook system for extensibility

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts

- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: Path utility functions
- Neighbor files: ./ssg
- Safe summary: Path manipulation utilities for static site generation including directory traversal protection and dynamic route detection

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts

- Main exports or names: SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, SSG_DISABLED_RESPONSE, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
- Reads as: SSG middleware functions and constants
- Neighbor files: ./ssg, ./utils
- Safe summary: SSG middleware handling dynamic parameters via generateParams, context detection for SSG builds, and disable/only guards

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts

- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi
- Reads as: Streaming helper exports
- Neighbor files: ./stream, ./sse, ./text
- Safe summary: Streaming utilities exporting base stream function, SSE with event support, and text streaming with proper headers

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts

- Main exports or names: stream
- Reads as: Base streaming function with TransformStream
- Neighbor files: ./index, ./sse, ./text, ./utils, src/utils/stream
- Safe summary: Base streaming implementation creating Readable/Writable stream pair with Bun abort signal handling and context stash for request lifecycle

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts

- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
- Reads as: SSE streaming function with proper headers
- Neighbor files: ./stream, ./text, ./utils
- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming with data/event/id/retry message format, chunked encoding headers, and error event writing support

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts

- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: Text streaming function
- Neighbor files: ./stream, ./utils, src/context
- Safe summary: Text streaming wrapper setting Content-Type to text/plain with X-Content-Type-Options nosniff and Transfer-Encoding chunked headers

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts

- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: Accept header parsing export
- Neighbor files: ./accepts
- Safe summary: Accept header matching utility export

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts

- Main exports or names: Accept, acceptsConfig, acceptsOptions, defaultMatch, accepts
- Reads as: Accept header parsing and matching
- Neighbor files: ./index, src/utils/accept, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Accept header parsing with quality value (q) sorting and default fallback support for type matching

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts

- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, GetConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
- Reads as: Connection info type exports
- Neighbor files: ./types
- Safe summary: Connection information type definitions export

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts

- Main exports or names: AddressType, NetAddrInfo, ConnInfo, GetConnInfo
- Reads as: Type definitions for connection information
- Neighbor files: ./index
- Safe summary: Connection info type definitions for remote address, port, transport protocol, and IPv6/IPv4 type enumeration
